subject: Re:
body:
it was to help serve, not entertain. just come at 6;30

----- Original Message ----
From: Catherine Derby <catherinederby@hotmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Wednesday, January 10, 2007 4:11:25 PM
Subject: 


Wanted to let you know that it's not a fabulous day for hair, clothing and I 
had two hours of sleep lastnight so I'm looking completely drained.  
Ghislaine even said how bad I look!  This is the first time I've been asked 
over for guests and I'd hate to not look nice and today is definitely one of 
those days!   I look like crap and my face shows it.  I will look terrible 
infront of your guests and I'd hate to upset you.  Perhaps I should come 
another time.  I would love to join you again.  Thank you for thinking of me 
and asking.  But I feel I must warn you.

Catherine
